title: Social Media Content Creator
short_desc: Help us produce TikTok and Instagram content for 4 D2C brands.
long_desc: You'll work directly with our two co-founders to plan, shoot, and edit short-form video content for our client brands. Expect 2-3 deliverables per week. We'll teach you the brief-to-edit workflow we use; you bring the eye and energy.
requirements: Comfortable on or behind camera. Basic CapCut or Premiere skills. Interest in consumer brands. No prior agency experience needed.
tags: social media, content, video, tiktok, instagram

title: Marketing Analytics Intern
short_desc: Build dashboards that turn ad spend into actionable client reports.
long_desc: Pull data from Meta Ads, Google Ads, and Shopify into a clean weekly client report. You'll own one client's reporting end to end after week three. Great for someone curious about performance marketing and numbers.
requirements: Comfortable with Excel/Google Sheets. Bonus: SQL basics or Looker Studio experience. Curious about advertising metrics (CTR, CPA, ROAS).

title: Email Campaign Coordinator
short_desc: Plan, write, and ship the weekly newsletter for two of our clients.
long_desc: Two of our consumer brands run weekly Klaviyo newsletters. You'll work with the founder on subject lines, copy, segmentation, and A/B tests. Full ownership after onboarding. A strong writing portfolio is a plus.
requirements: Strong written English or German. Interest in copywriting. Klaviyo or Mailchimp experience welcome but not required.

title: Frontend Developer Intern (React)
short_desc: Ship features on our React + TypeScript dashboard for healthcare devs.
long_desc: Work alongside two senior engineers on the customer-facing dashboard. You'll own small features end-to-end (design handoff to PR merged) and pair on bigger ones. Mentorship is part of the role.
requirements: Comfortable with React and TypeScript. Built at least one personal project with a component library. Git basics.

title: Technical Writer
short_desc: Document our healthcare API for developer audiences.
long_desc: Take feature specs and engineer notes and turn them into clear, scannable docs and tutorials on our developer portal. You'll set the tone of voice and own the docs site structure.
requirements: Strong technical English. Comfortable reading code (any language). Curious about APIs. Writing samples are a plus.

title: QA Tester
short_desc: Find bugs before our users do; help us ship with confidence.
long_desc: Run manual test passes on each release candidate, file structured bug reports, and help build a small Playwright test suite for the most critical flows. You'll work directly with the engineering lead.
requirements: Detail-oriented. Patient. Comfortable filing clear, reproducible bug reports. Bonus: experience with browser automation.

title: Financial Analyst Intern
short_desc: Build investment models for our wealth platform's content team.
long_desc: Research and model 3-5 ETFs and funds per week for our client-facing content. You'll learn our valuation framework and present your recommendations directly to our investment lead in Friday reviews.
requirements: Studying finance, economics, or business. Strong Excel. Curious about markets. CFA Level 1 candidates welcome.

title: Sales Development Representative
short_desc: Open conversations with early-career professionals interested in our platform.
long_desc: Run outbound outreach (LinkedIn, email) to a curated list of prospects. Book qualified intro calls for the founders. We coach you on messaging and you'll iterate weekly.
requirements: Strong written communication. Comfortable with rejection. Curious about sales as a career. No prior B2B experience needed.

title: Customer Onboarding Associate
short_desc: Walk new clients through their first 30 days on the platform.
long_desc: Run 30-minute onboarding calls with new clients, answer follow-up questions, and flag product issues to the team. You'll build the onboarding playbook with us.
requirements: Calm and clear in conversation. Comfortable on Zoom. Interest in personal finance. Languages: English required, German is a big plus.

title: Carbon Data Researcher
short_desc: Source and validate emission factors for our SME calculator.
long_desc: Research industry emission factors from public datasets (IPCC, DEFRA, EPA) and structure them into our internal database. You'll work with our science lead and own a category end-to-end.
requirements: Studying environmental science, sustainability, or related. Comfortable in spreadsheets. Patient with data quality work.

title: Sustainability Content Writer
short_desc: Make carbon accounting actually readable for SME owners.
long_desc: Write 1-2 articles per week explaining carbon concepts to non-experts, plus customer case studies. Your work directly drives our top-of-funnel growth.
requirements: Strong English writing portfolio. Interest in climate. Comfortable interviewing customers for case studies.

title: Climate Outreach Coordinator
short_desc: Run our partnership program with sustainability associations.
long_desc: Reach out to chambers of commerce and SME associations across DACH. Negotiate co-marketing deals and webinars. You'll travel occasionally for events.
requirements: Excellent communication in English and German. Comfortable initiating conversations with senior people. Mission-driven.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
short_desc: Design product flows and components for fintech and consumer clients.
long_desc: Work on real client projects from week one. You'll pair with senior designers, present in client reviews, and own component libraries on smaller projects.
requirements: Portfolio with at least 2 product design case studies. Confident in Figma. Curious about systems and tokens.
tags: ux, ui, figma, product design, design systems

title: Brand Strategy Assistant
short_desc: Support brand sprints with research, naming, and positioning work.
long_desc: Run desk research for brand strategy projects, contribute to naming workshops, and help shape positioning decks. You'll see brand work from kickoff to launch.
requirements: Strong written English. Curious about brands and culture. Comfortable presenting work in progress.

title: Motion Graphics Junior
short_desc: Animate brand assets for our clients' campaigns and product launches.
long_desc: Take static brand systems and bring them to life: logo animations, product reveals, social cuts. Work with our senior motion designer on each project.
requirements: Showreel with at least 3 motion projects. After Effects fluency. Bonus: Lottie or Rive experience.
tags: motion, animation, after effects, design, video
